title: Set a Restart Policy
description:
## Keep a Container Running

Restart policies tell Docker what to do when a container exits or the daemon restarts.

**Requirements:**
1. Run an **`alpine`** container named **`resilient`** in the background (keep it alive)
2. Give it the restart policy **`unless-stopped`**

> 💡 Use `--restart unless-stopped` on `docker run`. Inspect it with `docker inspect -f '{{.HostConfig.RestartPolicy.Name}}' resilient`.

hints.title: Apply a restart policy
hints.body: The --restart flag accepts no, on-failure, always, or unless-stopped.
hints.command: docker run -d --name resilient --restart unless-stopped alpine sleep 3600

validation.description: Checks that 'resilient' is running with the unless-stopped restart policy.
